title: High Fashion Vertical Triptych Portrait AI
sourceTitle: High Fashion Vertical Triptych Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-realistic high-fashion three-panel vertical triptych of same adult young woman fashion model with confident runway presence in a minimalist studio. Subject: same adult young woman fashion model with confident runway presence appears consistently across all three panels with the same facial identity, natural skin texture, strong fashion presence, and distinct styling in monochrome cobalt blue structured blazer with modern fitted styling, monochrome black sleek tailored outfit with sharp silhouette, and monochrome ivory sculptural dress with refined minimalist volume. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Fixed vertical three-panel triptych: top panel uses standing with strong sideways stance, one leg forward, hand in pocket, head turned over shoulder, middle panel uses seated on a chair with twisted body composition, one elbow on knee, hand lightly touching chin, bottom panel uses upright editorial pose with elongated neck, relaxed hands, and direct calm eye contact, each panel framed as a bold campaign shot with consistent scale and spacing. Signature Elements: Preserved high fashion vertical triptych portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Fixed source details: Background: soft pencil-grey neutral background. Style: Ultra-clean editorial fashion photography, 85mm lens language, cinematic soft lighting, shallow depth of field, sharp detail, luxury magazine quality, and powerful campaign styling. Color Palette: Fixed pencil-grey neutral studio base with monochrome look-specific outfits and restrained high-fashion contrast. Lighting: Cinematic soft studio lighting with gentle shadows, clean facial modeling, polished fabric highlights, and consistent light across all panels. Camera: 85mm fashion portrait perspective, controlled shallow depth, consistent distance, and strong editorial framing in every panel. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
